name: ETOMIC_SWAP
description: Etomic swap smart contracts and helpers

scripts.deploy:v1: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/EtomicSwapV1.js --strategy create2 --verify
scripts.deploy:v1:sepolia: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/EtomicSwapV1.js --network sepolia --strategy create2 --verify
scripts.deploy:v1:mainnet: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/EtomicSwapV1.js --network mainnet --strategy create2 --verify
